_comment: Project defaults for main.py / Streamlit. Reward and policy hyperparameters live in reward_configuration and policy_configuration below. Optional paths.reward_configuration / paths.policy_configuration point to external JSON fallbacks when those embedded objects are omitted or empty. Top-level policy and reward override last. components.* selects Python classes.

paths._about: Data locations and SUMO. To load reward/policy from files instead of embedded config, set reward_configuration and policy_configuration to JSON paths.

training._about: Trainer loop: epochs, train/test day counts, logging, LR floor, optional cosine scheduler, and divisor for estimated decisions per episode (used for epsilon decay and TOTAL_UPDATES).

simulation._about: SUMO step length, how often the agent acts (decision_gap in SUMO steps), simulation time window in seconds from midnight, and whether to use GUI.

flow_demand._about: Before SUMO: split each CSV time slot into sub-intervals with randomized vehsPerHour (renormalized so expected vehicles per slot match the counts). Set subslots_per_slot to 1 or spread to 0 for the old flat rate per slot.

phase_timing._about: Traffic-signal timing passed to the agent: minimum green before a switch is allowed, soft maximum green, yellow length, and overshoot_coeff scaling how far past max green is tolerated.

observation._about: Observation vector shapes / caps for QueueObservation (lanes, phases, timers, per-lane vehicle counts).

components._about: Which concrete classes main.py imports. eval_reward_class null means train and eval use the same reward.

reward_configuration._about: Merged as {**default, **<components.reward_class>}. Keys starting with _ and parameter_help are ignored when building kwargs. Add or edit a block named exactly like the reward class.

parameter_help.normalise: If true, reward modules may scale raw signals to a bounded range (class-specific).
parameter_help.scale: Global multiplier applied to the (possibly normalised) reward.
parameter_help.alpha: CompositeReward: weight on the first sub-reward vs the second (see CompositeReward implementation).
parameter_help.throughput_weight: ThroughputQueueReward: relative weight of the throughput term.
parameter_help.queue_weight: ThroughputQueueReward: relative weight of the queue term.
parameter_help.switch_weight: Penalty weight for phase switches (ThroughputQueueReward, WaitingTimeReward).

policy_configuration._about: Merged as {**default, **<components.policy_class>}. Epsilon decay may be the string 'auto' (derived from TOTAL_UPDATES) or a numeric factor per step. learning_rate in top-level policy overrides lr here.

parameter_help.lr: Adam learning rate for the Q-network.
parameter_help.epsilon_decay: Per-step epsilon multiplier, or 'auto' to match ~85% of total gradient updates.
parameter_help.target_update: How often (in gradient steps) to sync target network weights.
parameter_help.hidden: Width of the hidden MLP layers.
parameter_help.n_actions: Number of discrete actions (typically 2: stay / switch phase).

policy._about: Optional last-chance overrides on merged policy kwargs. learning_rate is mapped to lr. Omit keys you do not want to override.

reward._about: Optional last-chance overrides on merged reward kwargs (same keys as the selected reward class / default).

output._about: Directories for processed data, training logs, plots, and saved models.
